programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: A killer guns down a 46-year-old woman, and detectives discover that a fleeing Sheriff's Deputy is the assailant; less than 48 hours later, they arrest him and reveal an unrepentant psychopath capable of executing the love of his life in cold blood.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: After the murder of a successful executive one night in Connecticut, her case goes cold; four years later, a troubled man appears, ready to confess; investigators uncover this was no ordinary murder and that he's an impulsive psychopath.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: When a loving husband turns up murdered in his Loveland, Ohio home, the prime suspect is his troubled wife, who claims to have little recollection; detectives uncover her story is nothing but the manipulation of a vindictive person.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.sub_title: Make Sure You Get My Good Side
programs.desc: A road rage incident turns deadly as an elderly man is beaten to death by a teenager who claims he was acting in self-defense; detectives not only find holes in his story but uncover that he is a remorseless and manipulative psychopath.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: A young man's confession to participating in a plot to murder another teenager stuns police in a small Florida town; detectives uncover a plot involving a manipulative ex-girlfriend and a young psychopath with the desire to kill.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: After the murder of a rural Virginia couple and the disappearance of their adult son, detectives wonder who could have acted with such rage; when the son resurfaces, investigators come face to face with a true psychopath.
